type.zh: 上市公司与客户平台产品
type.en: Public company and customer platform product

region.zh: 美国公司服务全球市场

primary_buyer.zh: 中小到中端 B2B 企业

payment_environment.zh: 按营销联系人阶梯计费
AI credits 与 outcome-based 补充计费
payment_environment.en: AI credits and outcome-based add-on pricing

compliance_environment.zh: 全球隐私与数据治理要求
Payments 与 Commerce 的合规要求

competition_environment.zh: AI 原生 agent 产品冲击

regional_constraints.zh: 全球多区域扩张会持续放大隐私、数据驻留与 AI 责任治理压力
regional_constraints.en: Global multi-region expansion keeps increasing privacy, data residency, and AI governance pressure

regional_constraints.zh: 平台越做越全，越容易损伤“易用”定位并引发复杂度税
regional_constraints.en: As the suite broadens, the risk of complexity undermining the ease-of-use promise increases

regional_constraints.zh: 上探企业市场时，Salesforce、Microsoft、ServiceNow 的治理能力和既有系统关系会更强
regional_constraints.en: As HubSpot moves upmarket, Salesforce, Microsoft, and ServiceNow hold stronger governance capabilities and incumbent relationships

regional_opportunities.zh: 全球 mid-market 的统一前台平台仍然分散，HubSpot 继续有整合机会
regional_opportunities.en: The global mid-market front-office stack remains fragmented, leaving integration room for HubSpot

regional_opportunities.zh: 免费版 + Starter + Partner 渠道的组合仍然适合国际扩张
regional_opportunities.en: Free tools plus Starter plus partner channels remain a strong combination for international expansion

regional_opportunities.zh: Breeze credits 与 outcome-based pricing 让 HubSpot 有机会把 AI 变成新的 ARPC 增长层
regional_opportunities.en: Breeze credits and outcome-based pricing give HubSpot a path to turn AI into a new ARPC growth layer

claim.zh: HubSpot 将自身定义为三层客户平台：AI-powered engagement hubs、Smart CRM，以及由集成、模板、专家伙伴、社区与 Academy 构成的 connected ecosystem。
claim.en: HubSpot describes itself as a three-layer customer platform: AI-powered engagement hubs, Smart CRM, and a connected ecosystem of integrations, templates, expert partners, community, and academy.

claim.zh: HubSpot 重点服务 2 到 2,000 名员工的 mid-market B2B 企业，并主要以订阅模式销售客户平台。
claim.en: HubSpot focuses on mid-market B2B companies with 2 to 2,000 employees and primarily sells its customer platform on a subscription basis.

claim.zh: 2025 财年 HubSpot 总收入 31.31 亿美元，其中订阅收入 30.64 亿美元，专业服务及其他收入 6735 万美元。
claim.en: For FY2025 HubSpot reported $3.131 billion of total revenue, including $3.064 billion of subscription revenue and $67.3 million of professional services and other revenue.

claim.zh: 截至 2025 年底，HubSpot 拥有 288,706 个客户，平均每客户订阅收入为 11,414 美元，净收入留存率为 103.5%。
claim.en: As of year-end 2025 HubSpot had 288,706 customers, average subscription revenue per customer of $11,414, and net revenue retention of 103.5%.

claim.zh: 2025 财年 HubSpot 毛利润为 26.23 亿美元，毛利率为 84%。
claim.en: In FY2025 HubSpot generated $2.623 billion of gross profit at an 84% gross margin.

claim.zh: Solutions Partners 及其转介绍客户约占 HubSpot 2025 年末客户数的 25%，却贡献了约 49% 的 2025 年收入。
claim.en: Solutions Partners and customers referred by them represented about 25% of year-end 2025 customers and about 49% of 2025 revenue.

claim.zh: HubSpot 生态中已有超过 2,000 个 integrations 和 applications，可作为平台扩展层与网络效应来源。
claim.en: HubSpot’s ecosystem includes over 2,000 integrations and applications, reinforcing extensibility and network effects.

claim.zh: Customer Platform 的公开起始价格为 Free $0、Starter $20/seat、Professional $1,450/月（含 6 席位）、Enterprise $4,700/月（含 8 席位）。
claim.en: Public entry pricing for the Customer Platform is Free $0, Starter $20 per seat, Professional $1,450 per month with 6 seats, and Enterprise $4,700 per month with 8 seats.

claim.zh: Marketing Hub 仍然保留按营销联系人阶梯收费的机制，Professional 起价为 $890/月（含 3 个 core seats）。
claim.en: Marketing Hub still includes tiered monetization by marketing contacts, and Professional starts at $890 per month with 3 core seats.

claim.zh: HubSpot Credits 支持按量扩展，pay-as-you-go 价格为每 credit $0.010；Breeze Agents 的计费单位包括 customer agent 每次 resolved conversation 50 credits、prospecting agent 每次推荐线索 100 credits。
claim.en: HubSpot Credits support pay-as-you-go expansion at $0.010 per credit; Breeze Agents consume credits such as 50 credits per resolved conversation for customer agent and 100 credits per recommended lead for prospecting agent.

claim.zh: 自 2026 年 4 月 14 日起，Breeze Customer Agent 改为每个 resolved conversation 收费 $0.50，Prospecting Agent 改为每个推荐线索收费 $1.00，明确转向 outcome-based pricing。
claim.en: Starting April 14, 2026, Breeze Customer Agent moved to $0.50 per resolved conversation and Prospecting Agent to $1.00 per recommended lead, explicitly shifting to outcome-based pricing.

claim.zh: 2025 年专业服务及其他收入的增长，管理层明确指出主要由 Payments 驱动。
claim.en: Management explicitly said the increase in 2025 professional services and other revenue was primarily driven by Payments.

model_label.zh: 核心平台订阅：Customer Platform / Hubs / Smart CRM
model_label.en: Core platform subscription: Customer Platform / Hubs / Smart CRM

payer.zh: 营销、销售、服务与运营团队
payer.en: Marketing, sales, service, and operations teams

pricing_unit.zh: 平台订阅 + 版本等级

notes.zh: 这是绝对主收入线，收入占比接近 98%，也是 HubSpot 的战略核心。
notes.en: This is the dominant revenue line at roughly 98% of total revenue and remains the strategic core.

model_label.zh: Freemium 到 Starter/Pro/Enterprise 的 land-and-expand

payer.zh: 先由使用团队试用，再扩展到部门预算
payer.en: Usage team first, then department budget expansion

pricing_unit.en: Free, Starter, Professional, and Enterprise tiering

notes.zh: HubSpot 的增长飞轮并非纯企业销售，而是 freemium + 自助购买 + 销售扩展的混合模式。
notes.en: HubSpot’s growth flywheel is not pure enterprise sales; it is a freemium plus self-serve plus sales-assisted expansion model.

model_label.zh: 多维扩张计费：席位、营销联系人、limit increases 与 add-ons
model_label.en: Multi-axis expansion pricing: seats, marketing contacts, limit increases, and add-ons

pricing_unit.zh: 每席位、每联系人层级、额度包、附加功能
pricing_unit.en: Per-seat, per-contact tier, capacity pack, and add-on

notes.zh: 这决定了 HubSpot 的 ARPC 增长并不只靠涨 seat，而是靠多维增购结构。
notes.en: ARPC expansion is not driven only by seats; it depends on a multi-axis upsell structure.

model_label.zh: 伙伴驱动分发与实施生态

payer.zh: 最终客户付费，伙伴影响成交与服务交付
payer.en: End customers pay while partners influence acquisition and service delivery

pricing_unit.zh: 订阅收入中的渠道影响份额

notes.zh: Solutions Partners 对收入贡献极高，说明 HubSpot 的商业模式不仅是 SaaS 产品，更是产品 + 渠道 + 服务网络。
notes.en: The Solutions Partner contribution shows HubSpot is not just software; it is software plus channel plus service network.

model_label.zh: Payments / Commerce / 专业服务及其他收入
model_label.en: Payments / Commerce / professional services and other revenue

payer.zh: 使用 Commerce / Payments 与 onboarding 服务的客户
payer.en: Customers using Commerce, Payments, and onboarding services

pricing_unit.zh: 支付与商务相关收入、培训和其他服务收入
pricing_unit.en: Payments and commerce revenue plus training and service revenue

notes.zh: 虽然占比只有约 2%，但它是 HubSpot 从前台 SaaS 向交易与变现基础设施延伸的重要信号。
notes.en: Although still only about 2% of revenue, this is an important signal of HubSpot extending from front-office SaaS into monetization infrastructure.

model_label.zh: AI 计费层：Credits 与 outcome-based agents
model_label.en: AI monetization layer: credits and outcome-based agents

notes.zh: 这代表 HubSpot 正从传统 seat 模式向 hybrid seat + usage + outcome 模式过渡，是 2026 以后最值得跟踪的新层。
notes.en: This shows HubSpot moving from pure seats toward a hybrid seat-plus-usage-plus-outcome model, likely the most important new monetization layer after 2026.

assumptions.zh: 该值来自 FY2025 官方披露。
assumptions.en: This value is from official FY2025 disclosure.

label.zh: 专业服务及其他收入（已披露）

financial_estimates.formula: disclosed FY2025 professional services and other revenue

assumptions.zh: 该收入线中 Payments 是明确驱动项，但细分拆分未披露。
assumptions.en: Payments is identified as a driver, but detailed line-level decomposition is not disclosed.

assumptions.zh: 总毛利率 84%，仍保持典型高毛利 SaaS 平台特征。
assumptions.en: Gross margin of 84% preserves a classic high-margin SaaS-platform profile.

financial_estimates.formula: FY2025 total revenue * 49% partner-influenced revenue share

assumptions.zh: 该值不是独立收入线，而是根据 49% revenue contribution 推算的渠道影响池，用于衡量伙伴生态重要性。
assumptions.en: This is not a separate revenue line; it is an inferred pool based on the 49% revenue contribution of partner-influenced customers.

category.zh: CRM 与前台套件

selection_reason.zh: HubSpot 上探企业市场时最重要的套件型对手，尤其在 CRM、营销、服务与 AI 扩展层面形成正面竞争。
selection_reason.en: The most important suite competitor as HubSpot moves upmarket, especially across CRM, marketing, service, and AI layers.

category.zh: CRM / ERP / AI 套件

selection_reason.zh: 在大型账户和既有 Microsoft 生态中，Dynamics 365 是 HubSpot 的关键上探阻力。
selection_reason.en: Dynamics 365 is a key obstacle to HubSpot in larger accounts already embedded in the Microsoft ecosystem.

category.zh: 中小企业一体化软件套件

selection_reason.zh: Zoho 在中小企业市场用更低价格的一体化套件，直接压制 HubSpot 的 Starter 到 Pro 区间。
selection_reason.en: Zoho attacks HubSpot’s Starter-to-Pro band with a lower-priced integrated suite for SMBs.

category.zh: 中端销售与客服平台

selection_reason.zh: Freshworks 在销售与客服结合场景中与 HubSpot 有较高重合，特别是在 mid-market。
selection_reason.en: Freshworks overlaps heavily with HubSpot in sales-plus-service use cases, especially in the mid-market.

category.zh: 客服平台与 AI 服务自动化
category.en: Customer service platform and AI service automation

selection_reason.zh: Zendesk 在服务与 AI 自动化层面对 HubSpot Service Hub 构成直接竞争。
selection_reason.en: Zendesk directly competes with HubSpot Service Hub in service workflows and AI automation.

category.zh: AI 客服与客户沟通平台
category.en: AI service and customer communications platform

selection_reason.zh: Intercom 在 AI 客服和结果导向定价上更激进，是 HubSpot Breeze service layer 的重要参照对手。
selection_reason.en: Intercom is more aggressive in AI service and outcome-oriented pricing, making it a key reference rival for HubSpot’s Breeze service layer.

category.zh: 营销自动化与 CRM

selection_reason.zh: 在中小企业营销自动化层面，ActiveCampaign 是 HubSpot 的典型性价比型替代品。
selection_reason.en: ActiveCampaign is a classic value alternative to HubSpot in SMB marketing automation.

category.zh: 营销自动化与客户数据

selection_reason.zh: Klaviyo 在电商营销自动化领域对 HubSpot Marketing Hub 有明显重叠，尤其是在联系人与发送量驱动计费上。
selection_reason.en: Klaviyo overlaps strongly with Marketing Hub in ecommerce marketing automation, especially in contact and send-volume driven pricing.

category.zh: 销售 CRM

selection_reason.zh: Pipedrive 在销售场景中提供更聚焦、更轻量的选择，对 HubSpot Sales Hub 的低中端区间形成分流。
selection_reason.en: Pipedrive offers a lighter, more focused alternative in sales use cases, splitting HubSpot Sales Hub’s lower and mid-market audience.

category.zh: 工作流 + CRM

selection_reason.zh: monday CRM 以工作流灵活性切入 CRM，对 HubSpot 在团队协作和轻量管理场景构成竞争。
selection_reason.en: monday CRM competes with HubSpot through flexible workflow-led CRM for collaborative teams.

category.zh: SMB 平台 + 应用生态 + 支付
category.en: SMB platform plus app ecosystem plus payments

selection_reason.zh: Shopify 是最强的类比之一：都在做 SMB 平台、生态扩展和支付/交易层附加。
selection_reason.en: Shopify is one of the strongest analogs: SMB platform, ecosystem expansion, and payment-layer attach.

category.zh: 团队软件平台 + Marketplace

selection_reason.zh: Atlassian 展示了席位订阅、产品扩张和 Marketplace 如何长期推高客户价值。
selection_reason.en: Atlassian shows how seat subscriptions, product expansion, and a marketplace can drive long-term customer value.

category.zh: Freemium 创意协作平台

selection_reason.zh: Canva 与 HubSpot 都依赖 freemium、模板化价值和团队扩张逻辑。
selection_reason.en: Canva and HubSpot both depend on freemium, templated value, and team expansion.

category.zh: 工作空间平台 + AI 附加层

selection_reason.zh: Notion 展示了通用工作平台如何通过 AI 与模板化结构推高 ARPU 与扩张率。
selection_reason.en: Notion shows how a general work platform can raise ARPU and expansion through AI and templates.

category.zh: 支付基础设施与平台增值

selection_reason.zh: Stripe 是 HubSpot Payments / Commerce 延伸层最重要的商业模式类比之一。
selection_reason.en: Stripe is one of the strongest analogs for HubSpot’s Payments and Commerce extension layer.

category.zh: SMB 业务操作平台

selection_reason.zh: Intuit 在 SMB 经营流程中通过产品扩展与金融附加层提升客户终身价值，这点和 HubSpot 有很强可比性。
selection_reason.en: Intuit similarly increases LTV in SMB workflows through product expansion and financial adjacencies.

category.zh: 流程平台与企业治理层
category.en: Workflow platform and enterprise governance layer

selection_reason.zh: ServiceNow 提醒 HubSpot：当平台上探企业后，治理、流程编排和平台控制会成为更强的价值层。
selection_reason.en: ServiceNow is a reminder that as a platform moves upmarket, governance and workflow control become stronger value layers.

category.zh: 套件 + AI 附加层

selection_reason.zh: 它是理解 HubSpot AI add-on / outcome pricing 上限和套件化压力的关键参照。
selection_reason.en: This is a key analog for understanding the upside of AI monetization and the pressure of suite bundling.

category.zh: 自助式 SMB 内容与网站平台
category.en: Self-serve SMB content and website platform

selection_reason.zh: Wix 代表了更轻量的 SMB 自助内容平台路径，可作为 HubSpot Content / Starter 侧的对照。
selection_reason.en: Wix represents a lighter self-serve SMB content-platform path and serves as a contrast for HubSpot’s Content / Starter side.

category.zh: 平台 API 与按量收费

selection_reason.zh: Twilio 提供了平台化和按量计费逻辑的另一种极端形态，可用于理解 HubSpot Credits 的上限。
selection_reason.en: Twilio offers a stronger usage-pricing archetype and helps frame the upper bound of HubSpot Credits logic.

summary.zh: HubSpot 当前的核心优势不是单一 CRM 功能，而是“统一前台平台 + freemium land-and-expand + 伙伴生态 + AI 新收费层”的组合。它在中小到中端 B2B 市场的匹配度很高，但越向企业化推进，越会进入与 Salesforce、Microsoft、ServiceNow 争夺治理与系统粘性的战场。
summary.en: HubSpot’s edge is not a single CRM feature. It is the combination of a unified front-office platform, freemium land-and-expand, partner ecosystem, and a new AI monetization layer. That model fits SMB to mid-market B2B well, but the further it moves upmarket, the more it enters a governance-and-incumbency battle with Salesforce, Microsoft, and ServiceNow.

gap_note.zh: HubSpot 的前台统一性强于多数点工具，但仍弱于真正的超大型企业套件。
gap_note.en: HubSpot is more unified than most point tools, but still lighter than mega-enterprise suites.

gap_note.zh: freemium、Starter 与伙伴网络共同提高了渗透效率。
gap_note.en: Freemium, Starter, and the partner network jointly improve penetration efficiency.

gap_note.zh: HubSpot 已经从 credits 走向 outcome-based pricing，但长期贡献仍需观察。
gap_note.en: HubSpot has moved from credits toward outcome-based pricing, but the long-term contribution is still emerging.

gap_note.zh: 这一维度仍然是 HubSpot 相对大型企业平台的短板。
gap_note.en: This remains a relative weakness versus enterprise-heavy platforms.

title.zh: 把 AI outcome-based pricing 从两类 agents 扩展到更多高价值工作流
title.en: Extend AI outcome-based pricing from two agents into more high-value workflows

validation.zh: 跟踪 2026 年 Customer Agent 与 Prospecting Agent 的采用率、单客户 credits 消耗与净新增 ARPC。
validation.en: Track 2026 adoption, credit consumption, and net ARPC lift from Customer Agent and Prospecting Agent.

environment_adjustment.zh: 适用于全球市场，因为 AI 价值表述正在从 seat 转向 measurable outcome。
environment_adjustment.en: Fits the global market because AI value is shifting from seats toward measurable outcomes.

title.zh: 继续提高 Payments / Commerce attach rate，把 2% 的其他收入层做成更有贡献的第二曲线
title.en: Increase Payments and Commerce attach rate so the 2% other-revenue layer becomes a stronger second curve

validation.zh: 跟踪 Commerce / Payments 客户渗透率、支付量和与核心订阅的共购率。
validation.en: Track Commerce and Payments penetration, payment volume, and co-purchase rates with the core subscription.

environment_adjustment.zh: 这一建议更适用于已在 HubSpot 内完成前台流程整合的客户群。
environment_adjustment.en: This recommendation fits customers that already run front-office workflows inside HubSpot.

title.zh: 在上探企业市场时，把治理、数据控制和 AI 监督能力做成更明确的高阶价值层
title.en: Turn governance, data control, and AI oversight into a clearer high-end value layer as HubSpot moves upmarket

validation.zh: 观察大型客户对治理、权限、审计和 AI oversight 相关能力的付费意愿。
validation.en: Observe willingness to pay for governance, permissions, auditability, and AI oversight in larger accounts.

environment_adjustment.zh: 这是 HubSpot 与 Salesforce / Microsoft / ServiceNow 竞争时必须补齐的价值层。
environment_adjustment.en: This is a required value layer if HubSpot wants to compete with Salesforce, Microsoft, and ServiceNow upmarket.

title.zh: 严格控制产品复杂度，确保“易用”不被全家桶化吞掉
title.en: Control product complexity so the suite does not destroy the ease-of-use promise

validation.zh: 监测 Starter/Pro 用户升级后的激活率、模块使用深度和复杂度导致的流失。
validation.en: Monitor post-upgrade activation, module depth, and churn caused by complexity.

environment_adjustment.zh: 这更像防守策略，但对维持 HubSpot 在全球 mid-market 的核心差异化极其关键。
environment_adjustment.en: This is more defensive, but it is critical for maintaining HubSpot’s core differentiation in the global mid-market.

safe_control.zh: 维持模块化 packaging、清晰升级路径与易上手体验，避免因平台过宽而损伤转化和留存。
safe_control.en: Preserve modular packaging, clear upgrade paths, and ease of use so platform breadth does not hurt conversion and retention.

safe_control.zh: 在 credits 与 outcome-based pricing 扩张时，持续校准单位成本、免费额度与客户 ROI。
safe_control.en: As credits and outcome-based pricing expand, continuously calibrate unit cost, free allowances, and customer ROI.

safe_control.zh: 将企业治理、权限、审计、AI oversight 与数据控制做成独立且可销售的价值层。
safe_control.en: Make governance, permissions, auditability, AI oversight, and data control into a distinct and sellable value layer.

safe_control.zh: 持续加强全球隐私、数据驻留、支付与 AI 合规控制，避免国际扩张被监管掣肘。
safe_control.en: Keep strengthening privacy, data residency, payments, and AI compliance controls to avoid regulatory drag on global expansion.

unknowns.zh: HubSpot 未公开披露各个 Hub 的独立收入贡献，因此无法精确拆出 Marketing、Sales、Service、Content、Operations、Commerce 的收入份额。
unknowns.en: HubSpot does not publicly disclose revenue by each Hub, so exact revenue share by Marketing, Sales, Service, Content, Operations, and Commerce cannot be separated.

unknowns.zh: Payments / Commerce 的具体 take rate、支付量和毛利结构尚未单独披露。
unknowns.en: The exact take rate, payment volume, and gross-margin structure of Payments / Commerce are not separately disclosed.

unknowns.zh: 2026 年起的 AI outcome-based pricing 还没有经过完整财年的验证，暂时无法判断它对 ARPC 和毛利的长期贡献。
unknowns.en: AI outcome-based pricing only began in 2026 and has not yet been proven across a full fiscal year.

title.zh: 跟踪 2026 年 AI agents 的收入披露或管理层 commentary
title.en: Track 2026 AI agent revenue disclosures or management commentary

owner.zh: 投资研究 / 战略团队

success_signal.zh: 确认 AI credits / outcome-based pricing 是否开始显著提升 ARPC 或其他收入占比。
success_signal.en: Confirm whether AI credits and outcome-based pricing start to materially lift ARPC or the share of other revenue.

title.zh: 持续观察 Payments / Commerce 的披露粒度提升
title.en: Monitor whether Payments / Commerce disclosure becomes more granular

owner.zh: 投资研究 / 财务分析

success_signal.zh: 若管理层开始单列 Payments / Commerce 指标，说明第二曲线的重要性提升。
success_signal.en: If management starts to separately disclose Payments / Commerce metrics, it would signal growing second-curve importance.

title.zh: 比较 HubSpot 与 Salesforce / Microsoft 在企业治理层的产品差距
title.en: Compare HubSpot with Salesforce and Microsoft on enterprise governance capabilities

success_signal.zh: 形成一张治理、权限、审计、AI oversight 差距矩阵，用于判断上探企业市场的可行性。
success_signal.en: Produce a gap matrix on governance, permissions, auditability, and AI oversight to assess upmarket feasibility.

summary.zh: 对 HubSpot 来说，AI 既是平台差异化能力，也是新的收费单元，更是防止被“大模型外壳化”的关键控制层。当前最重要的变化不是“有没有 AI”，而是 HubSpot 已经开始把 AI 从 seats 附赠逻辑，逐步推进到 credits 与 outcome-based pricing。
summary.en: For HubSpot, AI is simultaneously a differentiator, a new billable unit, and a control layer against commoditized model wrappers. The key shift is not whether it has AI, but that HubSpot is moving AI from bundled seat logic toward credits and outcome-based pricing.

leverage_points.zh: Breeze agents 与 assistants 覆盖营销、销售、服务场景
leverage_points.en: Breeze agents and assistants span marketing, sales, and service

leverage_points.zh: Smart CRM 让 AI 能使用客户上下文而非通用上下文
leverage_points.en: Smart CRM lets AI operate with customer-specific context instead of generic context

leverage_points.zh: credits 与 outcome-based pricing 为 ARPC 提供新的增长层
leverage_points.en: Credits and outcome-based pricing create a new ARPC growth layer

disruption_risks.zh: 若 AI 只是附赠功能，价值会被大型套件吸收
disruption_risks.en: If AI remains merely bundled functionality, its value can be absorbed by larger suites

disruption_risks.zh: 若 outcome 定义不清晰，客户可能质疑计费公平性
disruption_risks.en: If outcomes are not clearly defined, customers may challenge billing fairness

disruption_risks.zh: 若 AI 功能太快扩张，却没有足够治理与控制，企业市场 adoption 会受限
disruption_risks.en: If AI expands too quickly without sufficient governance and control, enterprise adoption will be constrained

formulas.zh: 可信度 = 0.28×来源质量 + 0.22×直接可观察性 + 0.18×三角验证 + 0.12×可比性 + 0.10×时效 + 0.10×口径清晰度 - 风险扣分
formulas.en: Confidence = 0.28*source quality + 0.22*direct observability + 0.18*triangulation + 0.12*benchmark fit + 0.10*recency + 0.10*accounting clarity - risk penalty

formulas.zh: 伙伴影响收入池 = FY2025 总收入 × 49% 伙伴影响收入占比
formulas.en: Partner-influenced revenue pool = FY2025 total revenue * 49% partner-influenced revenue share

assumptions.zh: 正式披露值优先使用单点值；只有推算项才使用 inference 标记。
assumptions.en: Disclosed values are treated as point values; only inferred items carry an inference label.

assumptions.zh: 竞品与跨行业类比分数，是基于当前公开产品定位、定价结构和模式重合度做出的结构化推断。
assumptions.en: Competitor and analog scores are structured inferences based on current public positioning, pricing architecture, and model overlap.

source_notes.zh: 主要事实来源为 HubSpot FY2025 10-K、FY2025 业绩公告、官方定价页、产品目录和 2026 年 Breeze outcome pricing 官方公告。
source_notes.en: Primary facts come from HubSpot’s FY2025 10-K, FY2025 earnings release, official pricing pages, product catalog, and the 2026 Breeze outcome-pricing announcement.
